artifacts.name: Ring of Minor Haste
artifacts.description: Increase attack speed by 5%

artifacts.name: Ring of Duality
artifacts.description: Reduce damage by 10%, but your every second hit has a 25% chance to hit twice

artifacts.name: Kensei's Ancient Sheath
artifacts.description: Only usable by -Kensei-. Increase **Sword's Path** damage by 1%. Increase attack speed by 5%

artifacts.name: Warrior's Ancient Amulet
artifacts.description: Only usable by -Warrior-. Reduce **Heavy Blow** penalty by 5%. Increase damage by 5%

artifacts.name: Umbral Reaver's Ancient Dagger
artifacts.description: Only usable by -Umbral Reaver-. Reduce **Poisoned Blade** penalty by 5%. Increase dodge chance by 5%

artifacts.name: Lucksworn's Ancient Coin
artifacts.description: Only usable by -Lucksworn-. Reduce **Gambler's Fate** penalty by 1%. Increase loot chance by 5%

artifacts.name: Ring of Sacrifice
artifacts.description: Decrease health by 20%. Increase damage by 10%

artifacts.name: Ring of Balance
artifacts.description: Increase damage by 5%. Increase health by 5%

artifacts.name: Ring of Major Haste
artifacts.description: Increase attack speed by 10%

artifacts.name: Ring of Major Sacrifice
artifacts.description: Decrease health by 50%. Increase damage by 25%

artifacts.name: Faulty Dagger
artifacts.description: 0.1% to deal 10x damage, 1% do deal 2x damage, 10% to deal 1.5x damage

artifacts.name: Ring of the Blood God
artifacts.description: Dealing damage do enemy below 25% heals you for 1% of max health

artifacts.name: Bloody Ring of the Blood God
artifacts.description: Dealing damage do enemy below 25% heals you for 3% of max health

artifacts.name: Faultier Faulty Dagger
artifacts.description: 0.1% to deal 25x damage, 10% to deal 1.25x damage

artifacts.name: Giant Slayer's Emblem
artifacts.description: Deal 10% more damage to enemies above 50% health

artifacts.name: Ring of the Undying
artifacts.description: When you die, you flee the combat and destroy this ring

artifacts.name: Ring of the Mad God
artifacts.description: Increase damage by 25%

artifacts.name: Last Stand Banner
artifacts.description: When at 15% hp become damage immune for 3 seconds

artifacts.name: Blessed Last Stand Banner
artifacts.description: When at 20% hp become damage immune for 3 seconds. Increase damage dealt by 10% when immune

artifacts.name: Vampire's Fang
artifacts.description: With each hit heal by 5% of damage dealt

artifacts.name: Vampire's Fang of Greater Vampirism
artifacts.description: With each hit heal by 10% of damage dealt
